title: Fix portal sections not rendering after Version 36 deployment

requirements.text: Diagnose and fix the portal layout so that all sections (Memberships, Publishing Works, Releases, Recording Projects, Artist Development) render correctly for authenticated users. The portal is currently showing no sections at all following the Version 36 deployment.

quotes: Portal not showing any sections at all just now, Please address it

acceptanceCriteria: All five portal section pages (Memberships, Publishing Works, Releases, Recording Projects, Artist Development) are visible and navigable from the sidebar in PortalLayout.
No blank or empty portal shell is displayed after a successful login.
The PortalLayout sidebar navigation items render correctly for both admin and non-admin authenticated users.
Child routes within the portal render their list/content views without console errors.
The portal loads consistently on page refresh without losing section visibility.

requirements.text: Audit the TanStack Router route tree in App.tsx to ensure all portal child routes are correctly defined, nested under the portal parent route, and not inadvertently blocked by AuthGate or ApprovalGate wrappers that may have regressed in Version 36.

quotes: Portal not showing any sections at all just now, Please address it

acceptanceCriteria: All portal sub-routes (memberships, publishing, releases, recordings, artist development, admin) are present and correctly nested in the route tree.
AuthGate does not incorrectly redirect authenticated users away from portal routes.
ApprovalGate (currently disabled) does not block rendering of portal sections.
Navigating directly to a portal sub-route URL renders the correct page content.

requirements.text: Verify and fix the PortalLayout component to ensure the sidebar navigation links and the main content outlet are rendering. Confirm that the router outlet (Outlet) is present and active so that child route components are actually mounted and displayed.

quotes: Portal not showing any sections at all just now, Please address it

acceptanceCriteria: PortalLayout renders its sidebar with all navigation links.
The main content area displays the active child route component.
No runtime errors are thrown from PortalLayout that would cause the entire portal shell to go blank.
Mobile drawer toggle functions correctly without breaking the layout.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not remove or alter the ApprovalGate disabled state — it must remain rendering children unconditionally.
Do not change backend data models or Motoko actor logic unless a backend cause is identified.
nonGoals: Restoring permission gates (AuthGate/ApprovalGate enforcement) — this is a separate pending task.
Adding new portal sections or features.
Changes to the admin dashboard or role assignment pages beyond fixing section visibility.
